nasb.text: By this I know that You are pleased with me, Because my enemy does not shout in triumph over me.

esv.text: By this I know that you delight in me: my enemy will not shout in triumph over me.

cnv.text: 因此我就知道你喜愛我， 因為我的仇敵不能向我歡呼誇勝。

ccb.text: 我知道你喜悦我， 因为你没有让仇敌胜过我。

csbs.text: 在这事上我就明白你喜悦我： 我的仇敌不能向我夸胜。
